Description.SourceString: A taste of autumn reduced to slurry and warmed over the fire. In Fellhollow, pumpkin soup was a popular dish when the temperature started to drop. Locals would gather together and share enormous cauldrons full of soup, as a way to build bonds with their community. It is said that once the villagers created an enormous cauldron, so that Imaru and Xikotal could join in the tradition, though for the great dragons it was barely an appetiser.
